description_long: This is a cylindrical, metal trash bin with a removable flat lid, commonly found in urban environments such as sidewalks, alleys, and parks. The exterior is predominantly dark, with visible patches of rust and weathering, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The lid features a central, top-mounted handle for easy lifting, while the body has side-mounted handles for carrying. The surface is ribbed vertically, providing structural strength and a classic industrial appearance. There are no visible wheels or labeling, and the bin appears unmarked. The overall look is utilitarian, robust, and designed for manual waste collection.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a flat removable lid, side handles, and visible rust patches. It has a classic, utilitarian design with no wheels or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central handle and a side-mounted handle on the body, with rust patches visible on the lid and body.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the top handle, extensive rust on the lid, and both side handles partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the side handle and rust patterns, showing the ribbed metal texture.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the rusted areas on the lid and body, with both side handles visible.
